name: Abad in vivo OSKM full-reprogramming teratoma boundary study
summary: In vivo OSKM induction study showing that reprogramming can generate teratomas, dedifferentiated cells, and iPS-like cells with totipotency features, used here as a safety and taxonomy boundary rather than evidence of partial-reprogramming benefit.
model_system: Reprogrammable mice with transitory in vivo OSKM induction
